title: [FIRRTL] Parser fails on negative integer parameters

features.name: module instantiation with negative integer parameter override
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation that uses a named parameter override binding with a negative integer literal value (e.g., #(.A(-1)))

features.name: signed integer parameter declaration with negative default
features.description: Code should include a parameter declaration that uses an explicit signed integer type with a negative default value
